title: Crunchy Steamed Jamaican Sprouts Dumplings
description: A romantic keto fusion dish featuring savory fermented soy paste and crisp soybean sprouts steamed in bamboo for a salty, aromatic bite.
instructions: Finely chop the blanched soybean sprouts to maintain a crunchy texture in the filling.
Whisk the almond flour and xanthan gum together in a medium mixing bowl.
Mix the fermented soy paste, scotch bonnet, and thyme into the dry ingredients.
Add small amounts of warm water until a stiff dough forms.
Fold the chopped sprouts and scallions into the dough manually.
Divide the dough into twelve equal balls and flatten them slightly.
Line a bamboo steamer with cabbage leaves or parchment paper to prevent sticking.
Place the dumplings in the steamer over a pot of boiling water.
Steam the dumplings on high heat for twelve minutes until firm.
Brush the finished dumplings with sesame oil before serving hot.
